title: Contigo Byron Snapseal Travel Mug | Stainless Steel Thermal Mug | Vacuum Flask | Leakproof Tumbler | Coffee to Go Mug with BPA Free Easy-Clean Lid
features: SAFE and SEALED: The Snap Seal technology is designed for an easy, one-handed drinking experience; when you’re done sipping, simply snap the lid closed for leak-proof protection anywhere you go
ICE COLD OR PIPING HOT: Thermalock double-wall vacuum insulation keeps temperatures locked in for hours; drinks stay hot up to 6 hours or cold up to 12 hours, on the go, in the office or outdoors
DURABLE: High-quality travel mug, BPA-free plastic lid and vacuum insulated stainless steel body; the sweat proof design makes sure your liquids stay in the bottle, not on the outside
EASY TO CLEAN: Dishwasher-safe lid hinges open completely for easy cleaning (one connected piece, no separate parts to take apart or misplace); hand wash vacuum flask body
IDEAL FIT: The thermal mug provides easy and convenient one-handed drinking for both left- and right-handed users, and fits most car cup-holders: Size 8.3x8x18.5 cm; Capacity 470 ml; Weight 275 g
description: From the manufacturer CONTIGO Byron Thermal mug Elegant design combined with outstanding performance The Byron thermal mug impresses not only with its elegant appearance but also with its outstanding performance. It fits comfortably into any bag or backpack. Whether you like it hot or cold, it keeps your drink at the right temperature. Disposable cups were yesterday, shape your future sustainably. SNAPSEAL TECHNOLOGY Convenient drinking & closing at the touch of a button - in every situation The SNAPSEAL lock allows easy drinking in any situation. The travel mug can be opened comfortably with one hand. To drink, simply press the SNAPSEAL closure upwards, releasing the mouthpiece on the opposite side. To close the bottle, simply press the cap back down and the bottle is absolutely leak-proof. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. CONTIGO Contigo is with you everywhere and accompanies you in your daily life - whether on the way to work, in the office, during sports or in your leisure time. Delicious hot coffee or tea, cool refreshments during sports, all this is offered by the versatile Contigo products. And with quality.
